title: Mystery Match Village
short_description: Play as a 1930s detective: catch criminals, restore the English village of Kingsfall, and solve match-3 puzzles and hidden object challenges.
description: Jump into the role of a 1930s detective as you catch criminals and restore the beautiful English village of Kingsfall to its former glory, uncovering clues in charming yet challenging match-3 puzzles and hidden object challenges!
